name: tailshare
title: Tailshare
description: Share clipboard and files across machines over Tailscale
author: thedonmon

commands.name: send-clipboard
commands.title: Send Clipboard
commands.description: Send your clipboard (text, image, or file) to the default device

commands.name: get-clipboard
commands.title: Get Clipboard
commands.description: Get the clipboard from the default device

commands.name: list-devices
commands.title: List Devices
commands.description: Show all devices on your Tailscale network

commands.name: send-to-device
commands.title: Send Clipboard to Device
commands.description: Pick a device and send your clipboard to it

commands.name: install-cli
commands.title: Install / Update CLI
commands.description: Check if tailshare CLI is installed and install or update it
